description: AO OS ↔ n8n ↔ Notion connector configuration

operationalLog.name: AO OS - Operational Log
operationalLog.description: All AO OS events polled every 30 minutes from the API

healthCheck.name: AO OS - Health Check Log
healthCheck.description: Auth health check results written by the health-check workflow

workflows.name: AO OS Auth Health Check
workflows.description: Validates API auth endpoint and logs result to Notion

workflows.name: AO OS Notion → n8n Webhook
workflows.description: Receives Notion automation webhooks and routes to AO OS API

requiredEnvVars.name: NOTION_OPERATIONAL_LOG_DB_ID
requiredEnvVars.description: Notion Database ID for the Operational Log

requiredEnvVars.name: NOTION_HEALTH_CHECK_DB_ID
requiredEnvVars.description: Notion Database ID for the Health Check Log

requiredEnvVars.name: AO_OS_API_BASE
requiredEnvVars.description: Base URL of the AO OS API

requiredEnvVars.name: AO_OS_STAFF_PASSWORD
requiredEnvVars.description: Staff password for API authentication — store in secrets manager, never in plain text
requiredEnvVars.example: (use GitHub secrets or n8n credentials vault)

requiredEnvVars.name: STAFF_DIGEST_EMAIL
requiredEnvVars.description: Email address to receive critical event alerts

requiredEnvVars.name: NOTION_WEBHOOK_SECRET
requiredEnvVars.description: Shared secret for validating incoming Notion automation webhooks
